## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12]
- Node version: [e.g. 20]
- ChironAI version or commit: [e.g. 0.7.56]
- Browser (if CoreUI related): [e.g. Chrome 126]

## Logs / Screenshots

If applicable, add logs, traceback, or screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
